narrative:
Seneca County has 33,856 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.3% of registrants.
